'''Abam Tev''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Governor/Legends|governor]] of a poor, outlying [[Star system/Legends|system]]. [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]] outsourced production of the [[A-9 Vigilance interceptor]] to her [[Planet/Legends|world]] and Tev ran her [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyards]] without any concern for the welfare of the workers. The workers eventually overthrew her and allied with the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] around [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]], providing them with a batch of A-9s.
